demographics.living_situation: lives in a group residential (supported disability) home; fully dependent, bedbound, non-verbal

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: (reported by his support worker) He has been twitching continuously on his right side and violently coughing up his formula since dinner. He's normally a bit hyperactive but now he's gone really floppy and drowsy and won't respond to me.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Support worker called because the right-sided twitching has not stopped for about 3 hours and he keeps bringing up all his feed with a wet rattly cough.

symptom_narrative.onset: the right-arm twitching started about 3 hours ago; the coughing and bringing up feeds got much worse over today
symptom_narrative.duration: twitching continuous for ~3 hours and not stopping; feeding problems worsening all day
symptom_narrative.character: continuous rhythmic twitching down his right arm; wet, gurgling, rattly cough; bringing back up all of his formula feed
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: worst the support worker has seen him — he has gone from his usual hyperactive self to floppy, drowsy and unresponsive
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: twitching on the right arm/side; coughing and gurgling from the chest and throat
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant and not settling since it began
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing has helped; staff have not given his emergency medication
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it has kept going on its own; the feed kept running which made the coughing worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: breathing fast and noisy, pooling saliva in his mouth, looks duskier than usual
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: he has a known seizure disorder and has had seizures before, but they usually stop; this one has not
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: fully dependent and non-verbal at baseline; today he is not responding at all

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: microcephaly (small head) — a lifelong condition he was born with
past_medical_history.how_managed: managed long-term by his disability and paediatric team

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: severe global developmental delay and spastic quadriplegia (stiff limbs, fully dependent, non-verbal)

past_medical_history.how_managed: regular daily anticonvulsant medicine plus an emergency buccal medication for prolonged seizures

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: trouble swallowing and feeding — fed through a feeding pump; poor weight gain
past_medical_history.how_managed: enteral feeds via pump; dietitian involvement

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: known vision problems with wandering eye movements

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: emergency buccal midazolam (into the cheek) for long seizures — prescribed PRN

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives in a supported group home with 24-hour disability support workers; fully dependent for all care; non-verbal so cannot describe symptoms himself

communication_style.typical_message_style: worried support worker relaying observations on the patient's behalf; patient cannot self-report

paediatric_context.developmental_concerns: severe global developmental delay with a congenital structural brain condition; non-verbal and fully dependent at baseline

objective_data_offered.value: continuous rhythmic twitching of the right arm that has been going for about 3 hours
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: observed over video by the support worker, not a clinician examination

objective_data_offered.value: wet, gurgling, rattly cough; bringing back up all of his formula feed; saliva pooling in his mouth
he has gone floppy, drowsy and is not responding to his name — very different from his usual hyperactive self
he is breathing fast and noisily and his colour looks duskier than normal
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: subjective colour/breathing impression by a non-clinician carer

objective_data_offered.value: the enteral feeding pump was still running while he was bringing feeds back up
